# nomad_variable (Data Source)

Get the information about a Nomad variable.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "nomad_variable" "example" {
  path  = "path/of/existing/variable"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `path` (String) The path of the variable

### Optional

- `namespace` (String) Variable namespace

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `items` (Map of String, Sensitive) A map of values from the stored variable
